name: International Journal of Transgender Health
not_rated_reason: Peer-reviewed academic journal published by Taylor and Francis on behalf of WPATH (World Professional Association for Transgender Health). Outlet accountability scoring criteria apply to journalism outlets; academic journals are not rated.
notes: Publishes WPATH Standards of Care and original peer-reviewed research on transgender health. Open-access for SOC documents. First cited by R-127 (SOC8, 2022).
